description: Use this API to change the value of the element of the VREF array associated with a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_vref(ibus, id, newval)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Plant bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newval
parameters.description: New value to be assigned to the vref array entry associated with machine id at bus ibus. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
warnings - one or more of: - No excitation system model at this machine - Excitation system model at this machine is bypassed.
